pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_nuxeo.sh lines 217-220 create document at this exact path; export_result.sh line 14 queries this path; Nuxeo REST API documentation confirms path format structure

Code analysis: setup_nuxeo.sh lines 158-162 create Templates workspace at this path; export_result.sh line 19 searches for documents in this workspace; Nuxeo REST API documentation confirms this is valid path structure

Code analysis: setup_nuxeo.sh line 219 sets dc:title property to 'Annual Report 2023'; PDF file inspection confirms content title is 'Annual Report 2023'; export_result.sh line 19 searches for documents with this exact title

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified as accurate. The document 'Annual Report 2023' exists at the Nuxeo path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023. The target Templates workspace exists at /default-domain/workspaces/Templates. The document is a synthetic PDF file (12KB, valid PDF 1.4) containing fictional ACME Corporation annual report content. The task uses legitimate Nuxeo REST API endpoints (v1) with correct path structure format and NXQL search queries. All three metadata items align with the actual data and setup code.
